title: gynochthodes retusa
intro: Gynochthodes retusa is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the "red vine" due to its reddish-brown bark and leaves. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic compounds, which are known to exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities, contributing to its health benefits, including reducing stress and improving cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Gynochthodes retusa is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties.
